hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | sed -n 's/.*"command"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); case "$cmd" in "git commit"*|*"; git commit"*|*"&& git commit"*|*"| git commit"*) b=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$b" = "main" ] || [ "$b" = "master" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: commit on %s. Per CLAUDE.md, never commit to the default branch. Branch first: git checkout -b feat/... then commit."}}\n' "$b"; fi ;; esac
